text: WRITE NEW BLOG POST FOR elchemista.com WITH: TITLE={title} TEXT={text}
Creates a new blog post on elchemista.com with a given title and content body
create_post(title :: String.t(), body :: String.t()) :: {:ok, Post.t()} | {:error, term()}
PARAM body TYPE String.t() ALIASES content,text,post_body DOC Main post content
PARAM title TYPE String.t() ALIASES headline,subject DOC Post title
WRITE NEW BLOG POST FOR elchemista.com WITH: TITLE={title} TEXT={text}
CREATE STRIPE PAYMENT LINK WITH: AMOUNT={amount} CURRENCY={currency} PRODUCT_NAME={name}
Generates a new checkout session on Stripe for a given product name, amount, and currency
create_payment_link(amount :: integer(), currency :: String.t(), name :: String.t())
PARAM amount TYPE integer() ALIASES price,cost DOC The cost of the item in cents
PARAM currency TYPE String.t() ALIASES coin DOC Currency code like USD or EUR
PARAM name TYPE String.t() ALIASES item,product_name DOC The name of the product being sold
CREATE STRIPE PAYMENT LINK WITH: AMOUNT={amount} CURRENCY={currency} PRODUCT_NAME={name}
